    1. replaceById(Class)

Interface ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation

All Known Subinterfaces:
CouchbaseOperations, FluentCouchbaseOperations
All Known Implementing Classes:
CouchbaseTemplate, ExecutableReplaceByIdOperationSupport
public interface ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation
Replace Operations
Since:
2.0
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation.ExecutableReplaceById<T>
    Provides methods for constructing KV replace operations in a fluent way.
    static interface 
    ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation.ReplaceByIdInCollection<T>
    Fluent method to specify the collection.
    static interface

    Fluent method to specify the scope.

    Fluent method to specify options.
    static interface 
    ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation.TerminatingReplaceById<T>
    Terminating operations invoking the actual execution.

    • replaceById

      <T> ExecutableReplaceByIdOperation.ExecutableReplaceById<T> replaceById(Class<T> domainType)

      Parameters:
      domainType - the entity type to replace.
